title: senecio lyonii
intro: Senecio lyonii, also known as Lyon's ragwort, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family and is native to the southwestern United States. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation. The health benefits of Senecio lyonii include its ability to act as an antioxidant, protect against cell damage, and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in topical applications such as creams and ointments to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
